subject: refactor(pages): migrate pages to DaisyUI tokens
body:
- LoginPage: headings drop text-slate-*; config-missing warning becomes
  `alert alert-warning` (replaces hand-rolled amber alert block).
- NotFoundPage: full-page `hero bg-base-200` + `hero-content` replaces
  custom centering.
- ProjectListPage: heading loses text-slate-800 (inherits base-content).
- ProjectDetailPage: inline-edit input becomes `input input-ghost` with
  a themed border-bottom; description textarea uses textarea-bordered.
  Editing badge is `badge badge-info` (was bg-blue-100 text-blue-700).
  Delete button's hover-red is `text-error` (was text-red-500 / 700).
  Headings and body copy use base-content / base-content/60.
- ModuleEditorPage: expired-module warnings become `alert alert-error`
  (two occurrences — creator and counterparty views). Section dividers
  move from border-slate-200 to border-base-300. Inline note forms wrap
  in `card card-compact bg-base-200` + `card-body`. All h3 section
  titles drop text-slate-700 (inherits base-content).

Zero hardcoded slate/gray/zinc + status-color utilities remain in src/pages/.

Tags: refactor, ui, daisyui, pages
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
title: migrate pages to DaisyUI tokens
